slice: Feature 068 dedicated Search and EvidenceBundle API v1

findings.description: Schema-valid replay could alter authority or artifact state.
findings.repair: Require response hash, identity, persisted aggregate lookup and exact canonical reconstruction; commit cleanup before emitting replay_invalid.

findings.description: Public URL fields could persist embedded credentials or temporary signatures.
findings.repair: Reject userinfo and credential/signature query parameters in HTTP and PostgreSQL constraints.

findings.description: SELECT-star lateral queries required private columns despite minimum grants.
findings.repair: Use explicit projections and column-level grants for artifact, job, procedure and version state.

findings.description: Legacy document status defaulted to unknown for new catalog registrations.
findings.repair: Set migration default to draft and derive official_source/status in a server-owned trigger.

findings.description: Repeated rate denials could reuse one audit UUID and degrade to 500.
findings.repair: Persist at most one blocked audit per window inside the rate transaction and return subsequent 429s without duplicate inserts.

findings.description: PostgreSQL idempotency claim inferred new ownership from timestamp equality.
findings.repair: Use INSERT rowCount as the only new-claim signal.

findings.description: Transitive fast-uri 3.1.3 triggered a high advisory.
findings.repair: Update lockfile-only resolution to fast-uri 3.1.4 and run clean npm ci plus all/prod audits.

findings.finding: External query embedding initially executed inside the tenant PostgreSQL transaction.
findings.resolution: prepareSearchCapability now executes before opening retrieval transactions; semantic replay is resolved before provider invocation.

findings.finding: HTTP query embedding transport had no bounded timeout.
findings.resolution: AbortController timeout defaults to 10 seconds and is bounded/configurable with QUERY_EMBEDDING_TIMEOUT_MS.

findings.finding: Hash-valid replay could have preserved semantically corrupted source/citation/claim relationships.
findings.resolution: Replay validates deterministic identity, source/citation linkage, exact excerpt claims, support authority and contradiction references; corrupt completed state is deleted in a committed transaction.

findings.finding: ILIKE phrase search treated percent and underscore as wildcards.
findings.resolution: Phrase search now uses literal case-insensitive strpos and smoke proves percent returns zero.

findings.finding: Signed or credential-bearing URLs could enter response projections.
findings.resolution: Database constraints plus runtime URL filtering reject credentials, signature/token parameters and overlong URLs.

findings.finding: Duplicate citation identities and negative cosine values could violate response assumptions.
findings.resolution: Candidates dedupe by version/section identity and similarity is clamped to zero with explicit score semantics.

findings.finding: Broad artifact/scanner grants could leak private coordinates.
findings.resolution: Runtime gate grants only required columns and asserts object/scanner/lease/pipeline fields remain unreadable.

findings.finding: Comparative evidence must never be promoted to an ordinary supported claim.
findings.resolution: Bundle mapper promotes only supported exact excerpts; comparative evidence remains citation/gap and replay rejects promotion.

open_external_or_governance_findings.description: No durable acquired, scanned, ingested and retrieval-validated Antigua-first corpus exists.
Dedicated Search and EvidenceBundle APIs are still missing.
Human IdP/OIDC/BFF/session architecture is not approved or implemented.
No PR, protected merge, deployment or production observation exists.

open_global_findings: No authorized durable corpus bytes, current production scans or real ingestion exist.
No judged real-corpus keyword, phrase, semantic or hybrid quality/performance evidence exists.
No human IdP/session/BFF/provisioning/recovery or authenticated role-aware SaaS surfaces exist.
No production object store/scanner/dispatcher, observability/SLO, staging/load/HA, coordinated recovery or privacy operations exist.
No external consumer contract suites, reviewed PR, protected merge or deployment exist.
head: 42d2fda70b27ccc9178c6a8d69bba957ef953105

open_findings.finding: No authorized durable corpus bytes or real ingestion exist.
open_findings.required_next_action: Resolve BLK-CORPUS-OPS-001 and execute authorized acquisition/scan/ingestion without crediting fixtures.

current_slice: Feature 068 dedicated Search and EvidenceBundle API v1
global_readiness_gate: The backend feature is locally and independently verified, but global production readiness remains blocked by real corpus, human review/SaaS, production operations, consumers and release evidence.
